name: Lemon Party Meringue Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the pie filling mix, 2/3 cup sugar, and 1/4 cup water in a saucepan.
2. Blend in the egg yolks and remaining water.
3. Cook and stir over medium heat until the mixture comes to a full rolling boil.
4. Remove from heat. Add lemon juice and butter. Cool for 5 minutes, stirring twice.
5. Pour into the pie shell.
6. Beat egg whites until foamy throughout.
7. Gradually beat in 6 tablespoons sugar and continue beating until the mixture forms shiny peaks.
8. Spread over the pie filling.
9. Bake at 425 degrees for 5 to 10 minutes or until the meringue is delicately brown.
10. Cool at least 4 hours before cutting.
